title: manulea minor
intro: Manulea minor, also known as Red-hot Poker, is a flowering plant species in the genus Manulea, native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Manulea minor include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against infections. Herbal preparations of Manulea minor can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their therapeutic effects.
